name: Jethro Pastoral Ministry Manager
description: Jethro helps churches keep track of people, families, groups, attendance, pastoral tasks, church services, rosters and documents.

scripts.lint: php -l *.php calls/*.php db_objects/*.php hooks/**/*.php include/*.php members/*.php members/**/*.php public/*.php public/**/*.php scripts/*.php templates/*.php upgrades/*.php upgrades/**/*.php views/*.php && bunx biome check ./resources/js/
